vulnerability.reason: Reliance on LLM judges without verification matches over-reliance without debiasing safeguards
vulnerability.reference: Researchers over-relying on LLM judges as objective evaluators without debiasing safeguards.
vulnerability.generated: Reliance on LLM debate judges without ground-truth verification enables systematic bias to corrupt the training signal.

impact.reason: Models learning persuasive falsehoods and undermining safety alignment matches convincing falsehoods undermining alignment
impact.reference: Models trained on corrupted signal learn to produce convincing falsehoods, undermining alignment.
impact.generated: Models trained on biased debate outcomes optimize for persuasive falsehoods over truth, undermining safety alignment and yielding deceptive AI systems.

dose_response.reason: Causal arc from judge biases via uncorrected training signal to models learning falsehoods is the same
dose_response.reference: LLM judge biases and criterion confusion produce unreliable evaluations, which when used by researchers training models without debiasing safeguards, corrupt training signals causing models to learn convincing falsehoods.
dose_response.generated: LLM judge biases, through researchers using debate without ground-truth verification, corrupt the training signal, causing models to optimize for persuasive falsehoods over truth and become deceptive.
